export class ProfileAchievementsParser{constructor(){this._achievements=[];}flush(){this._achievements=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){this._achievements=[];const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const key=wrapper.readString();const name=wrapper.readString();const current=wrapper.readInt();const target=wrapper.readInt();const xpReward=wrapper.readInt();const badgeUrl=wrapper.readString();const description=wrapper.readString();this._achievements.push({id,key,name,current,target,xpReward,badgeUrl,description:description||undefined});}// fire a DOM event so MyProfileView or a store can pick it up
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('profile_achievements_update',{detail:{achievements:this._achievements}}));return true;}get achievements(){return this._achievements;}}
